## Summary

Describe the problem, the chosen approach, and the generated surfaces affected.

## Verification

- [ ] I added or updated regression coverage for behavior changes.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm lint` and `pnpm test`.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm test:pack` and `pnpm test:packlist` for package changes.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm test:deps` and `pnpm test:e2e` for dependency or generated-template changes.
- [ ] I regenerated and reviewed output-tree contracts when scaffold output changed.
- [ ] I added no credentials, private application data, generated `dist/`, or release artifacts.

## Compatibility and operations

Document migrations, provider changes, release implications, or follow-up work. Write “None” when not applicable.
